title: Schools (Year 0–13) - Ministry of Education
content:
Your child's education from primary to secondary school. Find learning guides for Years 0 to 8 in the Parent Portal, and available support.
- School transport assistance
- School zones and enrolment schemes
Ngā kaupapa hei tūhura
- Parent Portal Understand what your child is learning at school or kura, how they are progressing against the curriculum, and what you can do to support them at home. Find out more
Understand what your child is learning at school or kura, how they are progressing against the curriculum, and what you can do to support them at home.
- Attendance Find out when your child should attend school, and how to get support for your child to help them achieve their goals. Find out more
Find out when your child should attend school, and how to get support for your child to help them achieve their goals.
- Starting at school Find out about what your child will need at school and how to enrol them. Find out more
Find out about what your child will need at school and how to enrol them.
- What happens at school Information about how schools and programmes are run, and how you can be involved. Find out more

### What happens at school
Information about how schools and programmes are run, and how you can be involved.
- Learning support Find out about the resources, tools and assistance available if your child needs support with their learning. Find out more
Find out about the resources, tools and assistance available if your child needs support with their learning.
- Available assistance Find out about some of the help, provisions and financial support available to your child at school. Find out more

### Available assistance
Find out about some of the help, provisions and financial support available to your child at school.
- Home education Home education, also called homeschooling, can be an alternative to attending school. You must apply to exempt your child from school first. Find out more
Home education, also called homeschooling, can be an alternative to attending school. You must apply to exempt your child from school first.
- Healthy School Lunches We provide healthy lunches every school day to more than 240,000 students who need them to support their learning and thrive. Find out more

### Healthy School Lunches
We provide healthy lunches every school day to more than 240,000 students who need them to support their learning and thrive.
- Digital technology Find out about devices in schools and kura, and keeping your child safe online. Find out more
Find out about devices in schools and kura, and keeping your child safe online.
- Health, safety and wellbeing Find out more about the health, safety and wellbeing measures and support in your child's school. Find out more

### Health, safety and wellbeing
Find out more about the health, safety and wellbeing measures and support in your child's school.
- Netsafe Hector's world Join Hector and friends as they navigate the digital seas and learn valuable lessons about online safety. Find out more

### Netsafe Hector's world
Join Hector and friends as they navigate the digital seas and learn valuable lessons about online safety.
- Kia Manawaroa This is our dedicated pānui for whānau Māori, sharing stories, opportunities, updates and information about education. Find out more
This is our dedicated pānui for whānau Māori, sharing stories, opportunities, updates and information about education.
- Matavai Matavai is our dedicated newsletter for Pacific families, educators and communities across Aotearoa. Find out more
Matavai is our dedicated newsletter for Pacific families, educators and communities across Aotearoa.
